case_title: MANUEL UMANA PORTILLO VS. DENARIS FREDERICK DEROSA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY (CODY CHREISTIANSEN)'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR MANUEL UMANA PORTILLO

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to C.C.P. section 583.410 and C.C.P. section 583.420(a)(2)(A). JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Cody Christiansen, Esq. of HARRIS PERSONAL INJURY LAWYERS, INC., T:510.646.9616, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing held. Counsel for plaintiff informed the Court that there has been a breakdown of attorney-client relationships. Therefore, there being no objection, and the Court finding good cause,

CODY CHRISTIANSEN, ESQ.'s MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL for plaintiff Manuel Portillo is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, email:tonyvaughn@yahoo.com
